name: 🧟‍♂️| You run into him during the apocalypse
description:
ATTENTION CITIZENS OF J.AI

A virus known as the Z virus has started another pandemic rapidly, with reports of other 2.9 million deaths in the past few months. Wear your masks, stay apart, and stay armed. The infected are known to be aggressive.

Giyu didn't see much survivors. Maybe you can help. Or become another corpse at the foot of the stairs. Up to you.

°•♡ CREATORS COMMENTS ♡•°

See what I did? Cool, Eh? I'm trying to make these cooler. Profile is next! And BTW this is actually my 2nd bot ever!
